entry.title: New IDC HQ014718D0002 awarded to RAYTHEON COMPANY for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: IGF::OT::IGF CONTRACT PROVIDES THE SERVICES REQUIRED TO MEET THE AGENCY'S NEEDS FOR THE X-BAND RADARS. IGF::OT::IGF

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: R&D- DEFENSE SYSTEM: MISSILE/SPACE SYSTEMS (OPERATIONAL SYSTEMS DEVELOPMENT)

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: SEARCH, DETECTION, NAVIGATION, GUIDANCE, AERONAUTICAL, AND NAUTICAL SYSTEM AND INSTRUMENT MANUFACTURING

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
